assessor_1_raw: CHF-specific cohort with temporal lab sequence: the disease-specific scope is a strength, focusing on a condition where lab trajectories are clinically predictive. Additive feature design cleanly isolates temporal signal contribution. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Both models share the same static feature set. The sequence model's additional temporal lab trajectory is the only difference. Any performance gain is cleanly attributable to the temporal component. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: AUROC with bootstrap CI (1000 resamples) on held-out test set. Stratified analyses by age, sex, prior utilization, admission severity. Design is rigorous. Verdict: defense_wins.
